calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2026 Continued To Oct-05-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Roxy Aslanyan, Esq. Abrahamson Labor Group 213-493-6300 for Plaintiff.
Paige Waldberg, Esq. 818-961-8007 Kaufman Borgest & Ryan LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Jamie Ply, CSR #13323 714-316-3757 jplycsr@aol.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

9:37am At the first calling of the case, Ms. Waldberg experiences technical difficulties. The Court passes the mater.
9:55am The matter is recalled. The Court admonishes parties; punctuality, technical requirements. If parties' equipment and connectivity do not work, they need to appear in person in the courtroom for the hearing. The Court allows Ms. Waldberg to stop her video.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Sandpiper Property Management, LLC and Ranhit Dhawan's motion for summary judgment is DENIED. Defendants' alternative motion for summary adjudication.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Jamie Ply, CSR #13323 714-316-3757 jplycsr@aol.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
